claim_boundary: this summary is a research-only aggregation over one same-harness efficient-attention matrix. Runtime dense, hull-cache, and sparse rows stay artifact-backed, but the generic linear/recurrent and reformer rows remain proxy baselines and the hierarchical-hull row remains unpromoted research evidence; none of that becomes served capability through this report alone
summary: Public efficient-attention summary now freezes 6 same-harness workload winners from one shared matrix digest: promoted HullCache is still fastest on 2 workloads, the research hierarchical-hull candidate is fastest on 4, and the Reformer-style proxy now carries explicit refuse posture on 2 workloads instead of hiding unsupported locality assumptions behind dense-only comparisons.
